task_description: Consolidate all mysterycartel-hub GitHub org repos into the main mystermyself production repo. Copy TCU terminal legacy docs to docs/archive/, Remotion video engine to tools/trading-chef-studio/, Pine Script and AI prompts to scripts/trading-chef/. Exclude tools/ from Next.js/TS compilation. Create consolidation report.

verification.summary: npm run lint passes (only pre-existing warnings in LessonTemplate.tsx). npm run build succeeds with all routes compiled. tools/ directory excluded from TS and ESLint via tsconfig.json and .eslintrc.json. No test framework configured in this project so test_quality is skipped. No Dockerfile present.
